EventField.description:
One named field on the trajectory event the simulator emits per step.

Used by the renderer to emit a per-step shape assertion in the rendered
module — if the LLM's `step` body forgets to populate a declared field,
the sim raises `KeyError` on the first step rather than silently emitting
truncated trajectories that downstream tests have to detect.
EventField.title: EventField

description:
Plan for a deterministic, seedable simulator.

Round-trip identity is the contract: a plan written by the generator
must JSON-serialize, store as JSONB, and round-trip back to an
identical Python object — same as `WorkflowSpec`.

The plan does not carry the full WorkflowSpec; it carries `workflow_spec_id`
as a back-pointer. The generator and renderer both take the WorkflowSpec
separately so we don't risk drift between two stored copies.

description.description: One-line plain-English summary of what this simulator produces. Surfaces in the audit trail and the W7 UI. Must not contain newlines (they would escape the rendered comment).
description.title: Description

event_fields.description: Shape of the dict that `step` returns. The renderer emits a per-step shape check in the trajectory loop so violations fail fast and loud rather than producing malformed trajectories.
event_fields.title: Event Fields

imports.description: Stdlib modules the generated sim imports beyond the renderer's always-on `json` + `random`. Must be a subset of ALLOWED_IMPORTS.
imports.title: Imports

init_state_code.description: Body of `def init_state(rng): ...`. Must `return` the state dict. Receives a `random.Random` instance as `rng`. No leading indent — the renderer indents to 4 spaces. Must NOT import the `random` module itself; use the passed `rng`.
init_state_code.title: Init State Code

n_steps_default.description: Default trajectory length when input_data does not override. Capped at 10,000 to keep deterministic runs under the sandbox 60-second budget on commodity hardware.
n_steps_default.title: N Steps Default

seed_default.description: Default RNG seed when input_data does not override.
seed_default.title: Seed Default

step_code.description: Body of `def step(rng, state, step_index): ...`. Must `return` an event dict whose keys are the names of `event_fields`. Receives a `random.Random` instance as `rng`, the state dict from `init_state`, and a 0-based `step_index`. No leading indent.
step_code.title: Step Code

workflow_spec_id.description: WorkflowSpec.id this plan was generated from.
workflow_spec_id.title: Workflow Spec Id

title: SimulationPlan
